title: Shock
subTitle: A young lady who stays alone in a bungalow believes that anyone who enters the house will be a trouble maker for her. She then deals with two men who come to her house on a rainy night.

title: Okkade
subTitle: A minister assigns Yugandhar, an honest police officer, to find a way to stop gang leader Subbarayudu and his followers who are running a parallel government.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Bhaagamathie
subTitle: Chanchala, an IAS officer, is imprisoned in a haunted house for interrogation. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets possessed by a spirit.

title: Mahanati
subTitle: Savitri, an energetic and jubilant child, grows up to become an actress. She faces several challenges and overcomes hurdles to become the first female superstar in South India.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Saakini Daakini
subTitle: Two police trainees set out on a dangerous mission in order to investigate the kidnapping of a girl from a nightclub when they fail to get the police's help.

title: Oh Baby
subTitle: A seventy-year-old woman frustrated with her life, blames God for her misfortune. Subsequently, she magically transforms into a twenty-four-year-old after getting her photo taken at a studio.

title: Gatta Kusthi
subTitle: Veera has a preconceived set of criteria for what he wants in a bride. However, he ends up unexpectedly marrying a woman who is the complete opposite of his expectations.

title: Welcome Obama
subTitle: Yashoda agrees to be a surrogate mother to Lucy, an American lady. Unfortunately, during her pregnancy, Yashoda meets with an accident that jeopardises the child's life.

title: Yenthavaadu Gaani
subTitle: An honest police officer works tirelessly to dismantle an organ trafficking racket. However, he is oblivious that the very man he hunts is his beloved's killer.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Cinema Chupista Maava
subTitle: Irresponsible Kaththi falls head over heels in love with Parineeta. However, Parineeta's father sets certain preconditions that Kaththi needs to fulfil, in order to wed her.

title: Chandramukhi
subTitle: When a royal family starts to witness paranormal incidents in their mansion, they get in touch with a renowned psychiatrist to trace and tackle the possessed individual.

title: S/O Satyamurthy
subTitle: Anand faces several challenges as he attempts to save his father's wealth while trying to handle the responsibility of earning a livelihood for his family.

title: Manmadhudu
subTitle: Abhiram, a misogynist, works as a manager in his own advertising agency. When his uncle, the chairman, appoints Harika as an assistant manager, he mistreats her, but his hatred soon turns into love.

title: Bhadrakaali
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Julayi
subTitle: When Ravi unknowingly thwarts Bittu's bank heist, he becomes the target of Bittu's wrath. Susbequently, Ravi is forced to fight to protect his loved ones from the ruthless criminal.

title: Vishwaroopam 2
subTitle: Wisam Ahmad Kashmiri, a RAW agent, tries to prevent a terrorist organisation from executing a deadly mission against three countries.

title: Chandrakala
subTitle: A family moves into their ancestral mansion to try to sell it off. However, trouble starts brewing when they experience supernatural phenomena and a ghost mysteriously killing people.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: 90ML
subTitle: A man with fetal alcohol syndrome keeps himself alive by drinking a certain amount of alcohol. However, things change when he falls in love with a beautiful woman.

title: Kota Bommali PS
subTitle: A police officer is on the run after being wrongfully accused of a crime by a politician. A series of events unfolds as the officer evades multiple obstacles.

title: Raghuvaran B.Tech
subTitle: Raghuvaran, an educated yet unemployed engineer, is unwilling to accept jobs that are unrelated to his area of expertise. Soon, his mother's tragic death brings him a job as well as grave challenges.

title: Parugu
subTitle: A rich and powerful Neelakanta's perception about love marriage changes when both his daughters, Subbalakshmi and Meenakshi, fall in love.

title: Lucky Bhaskar
subTitle: A struggling bank teller takes a chance on a shady investment scheme with an unproven partner. Later, as his fortunes rise, so does his ego, driving him to take on increasingly reckless risks.

title: Bheema
subTitle: Orphan Bheema battles drug lord Dragon Manju and corrupt politicians who exploit the poor. His fight for justice clashes with crime and political schemes.
